response.justification: Experienced full-stack engineer with roughly 15 years of varied software work, but the resume shows no track record of AI/ML product leadership, no recognized AI expertise, and no director-level individual contributor scope. Recent AI-adjacent work (MCP tooling at re:cinq) is early and tactical rather than the strategic, platform-level AI builder profile this Principal role requires.
strengths: Long, varied engineering tenure across web, mobile, embedded, and microservices at scale
Founder of an open-source geo-data platform showing entrepreneurial drive
Recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling
concerns: No demonstrated AI/ML expertise or AI products built at scale
No evidence of director-level IC influence, advising strategic customers, or shaping cloud product direction
Cloud experience is implementation-level (AWS CDK, Kubernetes) rather than strategic platform leadership

key_factors.factor: Lack of recognized AI expertise and AI-built products
Breadth of engineering experience and entrepreneurial track record
